name: @rawsql-ts/adapter-node-pg
description: Testkit adapter that connects node-postgres pg clients and pools to @rawsql-ts/testkit-postgres fixture rewriting.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter rawsql-ts run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/testkit-core run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/testkit-postgres run build && pnpm --filter @rawsql-ts/shared-binder run build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../../tmp', { recursive: true })" && pnpm pack --out ../../../tmp/rawsql-ts-adapter-node-pg.tgz && pnpm publish --access public

author: msugiura
